name: dance2_loop
note: POKEDANCE (Pokemon Day viral dance) 'boogie-boogie bam-bam' move, 16-frame seamless loop. Rules for EVERY frame: both hands are held up like cute puppy paws — loose relaxed fists with the wrists softly dropped, knuckles facing the viewer — in front of her shoulders/chest. Elbows always bent, upper arms close to the torso, paws NEVER above head height, arms never fully straightened overhead. FEET: planted about hip-width apart and they NEVER leave their spot — no jump, no squat, no wide stance; the bounce shows only as knee softening and heel lifts. The signature motion: both paws and the upper body sway TOGETHER to one side while the hips push the OPPOSITE side, two bounces per side (boogie-boogie), then facing center both paws push forward toward the viewer twice (bam-bam). Cycle: 0 center dip -> 1-4 sway to image-LEFT with two bounces -> 5-6 back through center -> 7-10 sway to image-RIGHT with two bounces (mirror) -> 11 back to center -> 12-15 two forward paw pushes -> loop.
frames: Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, body at the LOWEST point of a gentle bounce: standing straight facing forward, feet planted about hip-width apart, knees slightly softened. Both hands held up like cute puppy paws — loose relaxed fists, wrists softly dropped, knuckles toward the viewer — one paw in front of each shoulder at collarbone height, elbows bent and tucked near her sides. Paws never above head height. Torso and head centered, upright. Big joyful open-mouth grin, sparkling eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, body rising out of the dip and starting to sway: torso and head beginning to tilt toward the LEFT side of the image, both puppy-paw fists (loose fists, wrists dropped) drifting together toward the left side of the image at collarbone height, elbows bent, upper arms close to the body. Her hips shift slightly toward the RIGHT side of the image, opposite to her upper body. Feet stay planted hip-width apart, knees easing. Paws never above head height. Big open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance at the TOP of the bounce, fully swayed to one side: torso and head clearly tilted toward the LEFT side of the image, BOTH puppy-paw fists swung together to the LEFT side of the image, held side by side at shoulder-to-cheek height near the left edge of her face (never above her head), elbows bent. Her hips push clearly toward the RIGHT side of the image, opposite her shoulders, making a cute S-curve. Heels slightly lifted, feet still planted hip-width apart, no jump. Blonde hair swinging toward the left side of the image. Huge open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy arcs. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, holding the same swayed position but at the BOTTOM of a bounce: torso and head still tilted toward the LEFT side of the image, both puppy-paw fists still together on the LEFT side of the image but dropped a little to collarbone height, elbows bent. Hips still pushed toward the RIGHT side of the image. Knees bent a little deeper so the whole body sits slightly lower, heels flat on the ground, feet planted hip-width apart — NOT a squat. Paws never above head height. Big open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, bouncing UP a second time while still swayed to the same side: torso and head tilted toward the LEFT side of the image, both puppy-paw fists together on the LEFT side of the image rising back up to shoulder-to-cheek height (never above her head), elbows bent. Hips pushed toward the RIGHT side of the image. Body at its tallest, heels slightly lifted, feet planted hip-width apart, no jump. Blonde hair bouncing toward the left side of the image. Huge joyful open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy arcs, cheeks flushed. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, swinging back from the side toward the middle: torso and head easing back toward center with only a slight leftover tilt toward the LEFT side of the image, both puppy-paw fists sweeping back toward the middle, currently in front of her chest between the left side and center, at collarbone height, elbows bent. Hips easing back under her shoulders. Body sinking slightly, knees softening, feet planted hip-width apart. Paws never above head height. Big open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, passing through the CENTER at the lowest point of the bounce: standing straight facing forward, torso and head centered, feet planted hip-width apart, knees slightly softened. Both puppy-paw fists back to one in front of each shoulder at collarbone height, elbows bent and tucked near her sides. Paws never above head height. Big joyful open-mouth grin, sparkling eyes, flushed cheeks, hair settling around her shoulders. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, body rising out of the dip and starting to sway the OTHER way: torso and head beginning to tilt toward the RIGHT side of the image, both puppy-paw fists (loose fists, wrists dropped) drifting together toward the right side of the image at collarbone height, elbows bent, upper arms close to the body. Her hips shift slightly toward the LEFT side of the image, opposite to her upper body. Feet stay planted hip-width apart, knees easing. Paws never above head height. Big open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance at the TOP of the bounce, whole body clearly LEANING like a banana curve toward the RIGHT side of the image: her head and shoulders tilt clearly toward the RIGHT side of the image while her hips push out toward the LEFT side of the image. IMPORTANT: her arms NEVER cross in front of her chest — BOTH puppy-paw fists (loose fists, wrists dropped, knuckles toward the viewer) are held SIDE BY SIDE as a pair on the RIGHT side of the image, next to her right cheek at shoulder-to-cheek height (never above her head), both elbows bent and pointing down. Heels slightly lifted, feet still planted hip-width apart, no jump. Blonde hair swinging toward the right side of the image, skirt hem swaying. Huge open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy arcs. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, still clearly LEANING toward the RIGHT side of the image but at the BOTTOM of a bounce: head and shoulders tilted toward the RIGHT side of the image, hips pushed out toward the LEFT side of the image, a clear banana-curve lean, NOT standing straight. IMPORTANT: her arms NEVER cross in front of her chest — BOTH puppy-paw fists are held SIDE BY SIDE as a pair on the RIGHT side of the image at collarbone height, both elbows bent and pointing down. Knees bent a little deeper so the whole body sits slightly lower, heels flat on the ground, feet planted hip-width apart — NOT a squat. Paws never above head height. Blonde hair leaning toward the right side of the image. Big open-mouth grin, happy arc eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, bouncing UP a second time while still swayed to the right: torso and head tilted toward the RIGHT side of the image, both puppy-paw fists together on the RIGHT side of the image rising back up to shoulder-to-cheek height (never above her head), elbows bent. Hips pushed toward the LEFT side of the image. Body at its tallest, heels slightly lifted, feet planted hip-width apart, no jump. Blonde hair bouncing toward the right side of the image. Huge joyful open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy arcs, cheeks flushed. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, swinging back from the right side to the middle: torso and head easing back to center with only a slight leftover tilt toward the RIGHT side of the image, both puppy-paw fists sweeping back toward the middle, currently in front of her chest between the right side and center, at collarbone height, elbows bent. Hips easing back under her shoulders. Body sinking slightly, knees softening, feet planted hip-width apart. Paws never above head height. Big open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, the first cheeky forward paw push: standing centered facing forward, feet planted hip-width apart, body upright at normal height. BOTH puppy-paw fists push FORWARD toward the viewer together at chest height, side by side, arms half-extended toward the camera with elbows still slightly bent (never fully straight, never above shoulder height), knuckles toward the viewer like a puppy pawing at the screen. Head bobs down a tiny bit with the push. Huge playful open-mouth grin, wide sparkling eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, pulling the paws back between pushes: standing centered facing forward, feet planted hip-width apart, knees softening so the body dips slightly. Both puppy-paw fists pulled BACK IN close to her body, one in front of each shoulder at collarbone height, elbows bent and tucked, knuckles toward the viewer. Paws never above head height. Head level, hair settling. Big open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, the second bigger forward paw push: standing centered facing forward, feet planted hip-width apart, heels slightly lifted so the body rises with the push. BOTH puppy-paw fists push FORWARD toward the viewer together at chest height, side by side, arms half-extended toward the camera with elbows still slightly bent (never fully straight, never above shoulder height), knuckles toward the viewer like a puppy pawing at the screen. Head tips up a tiny bit, tiny sparkle effects around her head. Huge delighted open-mouth grin, eyes squeezed into happy arcs. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: doing a cute rhythmic boogie dance, settling back after the paw pushes, ready to loop: standing centered facing forward, feet planted hip-width apart, heels back on the ground, knees softening as the body sinks toward the low point of the bounce. Both puppy-paw fists pulled back in, one in front of each shoulder at collarbone height, elbows bent and tucked near her sides, knuckles toward the viewer. Paws never above head height. Torso and head centered. Big joyful open-mouth grin, happy sparkling eyes, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
